text:
Waiver Type Code (9th Occurrence) ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: Monthly values for the 9th of up to 10 waiver type codes. There are separate variables for each of the 
12 months during the year. The last two digits of this variable indicate the month. 

SHORT NAME: WVR_TYPE_CD_09_01 
WVR_TYPE_CD_09_02 
WVR_TYPE_CD_09_03 
WVR_TYPE_CD_09_04 
WVR_TYPE_CD_09_05 
WVR_TYPE_CD_09_06 
 WVR_TYPE_CD_09_07 
WVR_TYPE_CD_09_08 
WVR_TYPE_CD_09_09 
WVR_TYPE_CD_09_10 
WVR_TYPE_CD_09_11
